title: thelypteris negligens
intro: Thelypteris negligens, also known as the Negligent Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Thelypteris negligens are often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
